steps.title: Identify the organizing signal
steps.content: After defining land art, the passage emphasizes the wildly diverse ways in which it is created, then immediately supplies two examples demonstrating that diversity.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: D directly describes this pattern: a genre's definition followed by examples of a defining trait. A, B, and C reference content not in the passage—artist biographies, criticism, and misconceptions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
